_meta.description: Trainer profile for Stephen Gray Racing — reused across all horses trained at Copper Belt Lodge.

full_address: Copper Belt Lodge, Cambridge, Waikato, New Zealand
bio: Stephen Gray operates Copper Belt Lodge, a boutique training facility based in Cambridge in the heart of New Zealand's Waikato thoroughbred country. Known for his patient, horse-first approach, Stephen has built a reputation for developing young horses into competitive racetrack performers. His hands-on management style and attention to each horse's individual needs ensure that every thoroughbred in his care receives the time and preparation needed to reach their full potential. With a focus on building long-term racing careers rather than quick results, Stephen Gray Racing provides an ideal environment for Evolution Stables' developing athletes.
